scope: P24 pre-implementation plan review for reducing tools/check-workbench-browser-events.mjs below 500 lines without weakening the 15-scenario browser-events closeout contract.

blocking_findings.summary: The first plan state still marked DeepSeek plan review as pending, so the phase could not proceed before an independent reviewer result was recorded.
The extraction plan did not yet make artifact/writeback ownership and withNextWorkbenchRuntime import boundaries explicit enough.
The content blockers were closed, but the plan status still showed P24.2 as pending, so the reviewer treated the phase as not ready.

non_blocking_notes: The extraction boundary descriptions were explicit and consistent after the delta.
The current implementation was still monolithic before extraction, which was correct for the pre-code-movement checkpoint.
The plan preserved the 15-scenario focused browser-events gate.
Root CLI/orchestration ownership for artifact creation, artifact writeback, Workbench API posting, and temp workflow recording is now explicit.
Fixture extraction is explicitly barred from importing Playwright, withRuntime, or Workbench API writeback helpers.
Runtime extraction is the only extracted module allowed to import withRuntime and WORKBENCH_MOUNT_PREFIX from tools/check-workbench-next-served-route.mjs.
All 15 required scenarios are mapped into default, lifecycle, and projected/mobile scenario modules, and the plan keeps UI-driven Playwright behavior instead of static artifact fabrication.
Estimated extracted module sizes are below 500 lines; the reviewer saw no manifest ceiling bypass or artifact-fabrication acceptance path.
The implementation should keep WORKBENCH_BROWSER_EVENTS_RUN_VERSION and scenarioResults root-owned or explicitly passed, and preserve the exact required_scenarios names in createRunArtifact.

decision.allowed_next_step: Begin P24 code extraction under LFA-P24.3.
required_follow_up_checks: Keep root-owned mutable scenario recording explicit; avoid hidden import cycles.
Preserve the exact 15 required scenario names in the run artifact.
Run syntax checks for root and extracted modules.
Run npm run check:workbench:browser-events and verify 15 scenarios.
Run DeepSeek code/evidence review before final gates.
